---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement for GitSolve AI
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem statement

Describe the problem or gap this feature would address. Focus on the pain, not the solution. For example: "When I run the pipeline against large repositories, I have no visibility into which files the context window included, which makes debugging token budget issues very difficult."

## Proposed solution

Describe what you would like to happen. Be as specific as you can about:
- The new behaviour from a user perspective
- How it fits into the existing pipeline stages (Scout, Triage, Analysis, Execution, Review)
- Any new configuration properties that would be needed

## Alternatives considered

What alternative approaches have you considered, and why do you prefer the proposed solution?

## Implementation notes (optional)

If you have a sense of where in the codebase this would land (e.g., a specific agent, a new service, a new `IssueStore` method), include those thoughts here. This is optional — the maintainers will assess scope during triage.

## Are you willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I am willing to open a pull request for this feature
- [ ] No, I am requesting this for someone else to implement

## Additional context

Links, references, or screenshots that support the proposal.
